motivo: código extraído mas apenas 5/6 seções presentes
resposta:
solution: 
```python
class Solution:
    def memLeak(self, memory1: int, memory2: int) -> List[int]:
        crashTime = 1
        memory1_crash = memory1
        memory2_crash = memory2
        while memory1 < crashTime or memory2 < crashTime:
            if memory1 >= memory2:
                memory1 -= crashTime
                memory1_crash = memory1
            else:
                memory2 -= crashTime
                memory2_crash = memory2
            crashTime += 1
        return [crashTime, memory1_crash, memory2_crash]
```

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
